# Pull Request

## PR type

Select one or more options.

- [ ] New article
- [ ] Article update
- [ ] Editorial fix
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Governance, security, or process

## Description

Explain what changed and why.

## Related links

- Issue:
- Discussion:
- Article preview:
- Other:

## Article checklist

Fill this if PR includes article work.

- [ ] Content is relevant to dout.dev
- [ ] I read `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`
- [ ] I read `CONTENT_GUIDELINES.md`
- [ ] I filled frontmatter
- [ ] I cited sources and references
- [ ] I verified rights for images and assets
- [ ] I added alt text for meaningful images
- [ ] I disclosed relevant AI usage
- [ ] I accept review and change requests

## Code checklist

Fill this if PR includes source code changes.

- [ ] I explained problem solved
- [ ] I tested changes
- [ ] I considered accessibility
- [ ] I considered performance
- [ ] I updated docs/examples when needed
- [ ] I did not add secrets, tokens, or credentials

## Impact

Describe impact on:

- build:
- content:
- accessibility:
- performance:
- security:
- moderation:

## Maintainer voting

To be filled by maintainers.

| Maintainer | Vote | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
|  | approve / changes / reject |  |
|  | approve / changes / reject |  |
|  | approve / changes / reject |  |

## Decision

- [ ] Approved
- [ ] Approved with minor changes
- [ ] Changes requested
- [ ] Rejected
- [ ] Blocked by reasoned veto

Reason:
